backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a multiplayer game session manager with CRUD operations for game sessions, territory ownership, and unit positions stored in mutable Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented bot AI teamwork features for both Colonizer and Native Peoples factions, including role assignment, coordination logic, and shared team state computation in botAI.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, utilities, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Terras Ancestrais' that mounts the React root and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level navigation between landing, tutorial, lobby, and game views, passing player configuration to GamePage.
frontend/src/components/CaptureProgressB: Small React component rendering a colored progress bar reflecting a territory's capture progress, hidden when fully owned by the expected team.
frontend/src/components/GameBoard.tsx: Canvas-based game board component that renders terrain-colored territories with ownership tints, animated unit sprites with health bars, movement range overlays, and capture progress indicators.
frontend/src/components/GameLobby.tsx: Lobby screen component displaying two team columns of eight configurable PlayerSlotCards with balance validation and a Start Game button.
frontend/src/components/GameOverScreen.t: Displays the game-over screen with a winner announcement, animated canvas confetti/particle effect, team-specific emblems, and buttons to play again or return to the lobby. Also triggers a fanfare sound effect on mount.
frontend/src/components/GameTimer.tsx: Renders a match countdown timer and an optional conquest countdown timer with color-coded warning/critical states (orange and red pulsing styles).
frontend/src/components/HelpOverlay.tsx: Shows a modal overlay with a categorized guide covering controls for unit selection, movement, combat, territory capture, win conditions, and terrain bonuses, closeable via Escape or a close button.
frontend/src/components/LandingScreen.ts: Renders the game's landing/title screen with decorative corner ornaments, team emblems, a styled title card, and buttons to start playing or view the tutorial.
frontend/src/components/PlayerSlotCard.t: A lobby card component for configuring a single player slot, allowing toggling between human/bot, entering a player name, selecting a team (NativePeoples or Colonizers), and choosing a class with its emblem.
frontend/src/components/TalentSelectionM: A level-up modal that presents two talent path choices (PathA/PathB) for a given unit, displaying each path's name, description, and stat bonuses so the player can specialize their unit.
Renders a sidebar legend showing territory ownership counts, a conquest progress bar, strategic point statuses, and an animated countdown when colonizers hold all strategic points.
frontend/src/components/TutorialScreen.t: Multi-step tutorial screen component that walks players through game mechanics (map, movement, combat, conquest, victory conditions, RPG progression) with step-by-step detail lists and skip/complete callbacks.
Panel UI for a selected game unit displaying its stats, terrain info, available actions (move, attack, fortify, abilities, build/destroy), and action feedback flashes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameEngine.ts: Core game engine hook managing full game state including unit selection, movement, combat, XP/leveling, territory conquest, bot AI turns, and a countdown timer with win condition checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, identity persistence, and status tracking across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating game session data (get session, create session, update territory ownership, update unit position) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundEffects.ts: React hook that manages all game sound effects using the Web Audio API, including unit actions, ambient loops (forest, tribal drums, conquest drone), and procedural sounds like musket fire and fanfares, with a global mute toggle.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports period-appropriate fonts (Cinzel, IM Fell English), defines a 16th-century parchment-themed CSS variable palette for light/dark modes, and provides utility component classes like parchment backgrounds and ornate borders.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/GamePage.tsx: Main game page component that wires together the game engine, sound effects, board rendering, and UI panels (timer, unit actions, legend, help overlay, talent selection), handling user interactions and ambient audio based on game state.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the entire game domain, including enums for teams, terrain, and unit classes, plus interfaces for units, territories, constructions, game state, and RPG progression constants.
frontend/src/utils/botAI.ts: Bot AI logic that computes a shared team context once per turn and assigns roles (capture, defend, heal, build, etc.) to bot units, then generates move/attack/ability actions using heuristics like nearest-target selection and strategic point prioritization.
frontend/src/utils/gameInitializer.ts: Defines base stats, abilities, and talent upgrade paths for all unit classes, and provides utility functions for initializing game state including map layout, territory generation, and unit placement.
frontend/src/utils/winConditions.ts: Provides utility functions to check win conditions for the game: Colonizers win by holding all strategic points until the conquest countdown reaches zero, Native Peoples win if time runs out. Also calculates conquest progress state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom fonts (Cinzel, IM Fell English), extended color palette using OKLCH values for game-specific colors (parchment, terracotta, native-green, colonizer-red, etc.), and plugin imports for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 15) describing a 16th-century 2D top-down team strategy/RPG with Native Peoples vs Colonizers factions, 8-player lobby, class/talent systems, map features, win conditions, and a list of implemented features and architectural notes.
